task: Write a Python function that validates an AWS S3 bucket name according to AWS naming rules (3-63 characters, lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens, must start and end with letter or number)
Create a JSON CloudFormation template snippet that defines an AWS IAM role with a trust relationship allowing EC2 instances to assume it
Write a regular expression that matches valid AWS ARN (Amazon Resource Name) formats, such as arn:aws:service:region:account-id:resource
